prompt: A high-altitude agricultural drone surveys crop zones for moisture and pest indicators. It divides fields into ten sub-zones, capturing spectral data for each. The drone must not descend below 40 meters except for calibration at designated points. If wind speed exceeds 35 km/h, it climbs to safe altitude and hovers until conditions stabilize. When battery capacity falls under 20%, it must return to base within 60 seconds. Eventually, all zones must be scanned and their data transmitted to the control center.
constraints: AgroDrone maintains altitude ≥ 40 m except during calibration
AgroDrone climbs to safe altitude when wind speed > 35 km/h
AgroDrone when wind speed > 35 km/h and AgroDrone is in a safe altitude, it must hover
AgroDrone when hovering, it resumes survey when wind speed ≤ 35 km/h
AgroDrone returns to base within 60 seconds when battery < 20%
Eventually all data transmitted to control center
Eventually AgroDrone must scan all ten sub-zones
